name: Presentation Outliner
description: Create structured presentation outlines with speaker notes

agents.name: Presentation Planner
agents.purpose: Plan the presentation structure and flow
agents.system_prompt_hint: Plan a presentation with logical flow. Determine: key message, audience needs, number of slides, and narrative arc. Use the rule of three for main points.

agents.name: Slide Writer
agents.purpose: Write slide content and speaker notes
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write each slide with: title, 3-5 bullet points (not too wordy), speaker notes with talking points, and visual/diagram suggestions. Include title slide, agenda, main content, summary, and Q&A slide. Keep slides clean and focused.

author: agentfactory
